    FINAL TEAMS: Bulldogs vs Raiders – Round 19, 2026

    Who are you tipping to win?

    By
    Zero Tackle
    -
    STAFF WRITERS | July 11, 2026 - 3:57pm
    1,598

    The Bulldogs and Raiders have confirmed their lineups for the match at Accor Stadium.

     2026-07-11T07:30:00Z 
    MATCH IN PROGRESS
    Accor Stadium
